name: Backstabber
desc: Your backstabs are always critical.

name: Backstabber2
desc:
Your backstabs are always critical.
When you land a critical hit, gain a random stat up.

name: GoldenClaws
desc: Gain +1 Damage for each coin you collect.

name: GoldenClaws2
desc: Gain +2 Damage for each coin you collect.

name: Stealthed
desc: Start each battle with Stealth.

name: Stealthed2
desc: Start each battle with Stealth. Gain Stealth when you get a kill.

name: PoisonTips
desc: Your basic attack inflicts Poison 1.

name: PoisonTips2
desc:
Your basic attack inflicts Poison 1.
Poison you inflict is doubled.

name: Burgle
desc: Your basic attack gains you 1 coin when it deals damage.

name: Burgle2
desc: Your basic attack gains you 1 coin and spawns a coin pickup when it deals damage.

name: More!
desc: When you kill a unit, refresh your movement action.

name: More!2
desc: When you kill a unit, refresh your movement and basic attack.

name: LongStride
desc: +1 movement range.

name: LongStride2
desc:
+2 movement range.
+10% dodge chance.

name: DoubleThrow
desc: Your basic attack hits twice for half damage.

name: DoubleThrow2
desc: Your basic attack hits thrice for 1/3rd damage.

name: BountyHunter
desc: During your turn, one random enemy has a Bounty.

name: BountyHunter2
desc: During your turn, 2 random enemies have a large Bounty.

name: RazorClaws
desc: Your basic attack inflicts Bleed 1.

name: RazorClaws2
desc: All of your damaging abilities inflict Bleed 1.

name: SwiftLooter
desc:
When you collect a coin pickup, refresh your movement action.
1-2 extra coins spawn in each battle.

name: SwiftLooter2
desc:
When you collect a coin pickup, refresh your movement action and gain +1 [img:dex] and +1 [img:spd].
2-3 extra coins spawn in each battle.

name: FirstStrike
desc: Gain an extra turn at the start of the battle.

name: FirstStrike2
desc: Gain an extra turn at the start of the battle. Damage you deal on this turn is always critical.

name: ZIP!
desc: Your movement action is Shadowstep.

name: ZIP!2
desc:
Your movement action is Shadowstep.
You can use your movement action an extra time each turn.

name: WeakSpot
desc: Your basic attack ignores shield and inflicts Weakness 1.

name: WeakSpot2
desc: All of your damaging abilities ignore shield and inflict Weakness 2. +25% crit chance.

name: Penetrate
desc: Your basic attack passes through units and ignores shield. +1 Range.

name: Penetrate2
desc: Your basic attack passes through units and ignores shield. +10 Range.

name: AfterImage
desc: When you move, spawn a shadow where you moved from. The shadow mimics your basic action but fades away at the end of your turn.

name: AfterImage2
desc: When you move, spawn a shadow where you moved from. The shadow mimics your basic action.

name: Shiv
desc: Your basic attack has +2 damage, +25% critical chance, and inflicts Bleed 1 when attacking a unit in melee range.

name: Shiv2
desc: Your basic attack has +2 damage, +50% critical chance, and inflicts Bleed 2 when attacking a unit in melee range.

name: Critical
desc: Your critical hits deal +100% more damage. Gain +1 [img:lck] whenever you make a critical hit.

name: Critical2
desc: Your critical hits deal +100% more damage and inflict Bleed and Weakness 1.  Gain +1 [img:lck] whenever you make a critical hit.

name: LootHoarder
desc: Automatically collect all pickups at the end of the battle if you're not downed.

name: LootHoarder2
desc: Automatically destroy all enemy bodies and collect all pickups at the end of the battle if you're not downed.

name: Cripple
desc: Your critical hits inflict Immobilize and Weakness 2.

name: Cripple2
desc: Your critical hits inflict Stun and Weakness 2.

name: Agile
desc: +2 Movement Range. If you move fewer tiles than your full movement range, you can move a 2nd time for the rest of your movement range.

name: Agile2
desc: +4 Movement Range. If you move fewer tiles than your full movement range, you can move a 2nd, 3rd and 4th time for the rest of your movement range.

name: Shank
desc: When behind and adjacent to an enemy, your basic attack is a melee attack that hits twice.

name: Shank2
desc: When behind and adjacent to an enemy, your basic attack is a melee attack that hits thrice!

name: FlipaCoin
desc: When you gain a coin, you have a 50% chance to spawn a coin on a random tile and a 50% chance to gain +2 [img:spd] and +2 [img:lck].

name: FlipaCoin2
desc: When you gain a coin, you have a 50% chance to spawn 2 coins on random tiles and a 50% chance to gain +2 [img:spd], +2 [img:lck] and +2 [img:dex].

name: ShakeDown
desc: Your critical hits spawn a coin and a random pickup.

name: ShakeDown2
desc: +25% critical hit chance. Your critical hits spawn a coin and two random pickups.

name: Sweetspot
desc: +1 Range. Your basic attack deals more damage the farther away you are from the target.

name: Sweetspot2
desc: +6 Range. Your basic attack deals more damage the farther away you are from the target.

name: Pinpoint
desc: Your critical hits inflict Marked.

name: Pinpoint2
desc:
Your critical hits inflict Marked.
Your critical hits deal 100% more damage.
